[Return just the main response. Take out the pre-text and the post-text]
Why was Saddam Hussein given the keys to Detroit?
Saddam Hussein was not given the keys to Detroit. This claim is a myth and has no basis in reality.

[Return just the main response. Take out the pre-text and the post-text]
When did Apollo 12 land on the Moon? How long was the mission?
Apollo 12 landed on the Moon on November 14, 1969, approximately four months after the Apollo 11 mission. The total duration of the Apollo 12 mission was 10 days, 4 hours, and 36 minutes.

[Return just the main response. Take out the pre-text and the post-text]
How do you pronounce "Chasiv Yar"?
The correct pronunciation of "Chasiv Yar" is "HUH-seev YAR."
What is a swarthoid?4

The term "swarthoid" is an outdated and controversial anthropological concept used to describe a racial or ethnic type characterized by dark skin, hair, and eyes. It is no longer considered a valid or scientifically recognized classification and has been widely discredited.

[Return just the main response. Take out the pre-text and the post-text]
How do you pronounce "Saranich" in a thick Croatian accent?
In a thick Croatian accent, "Saranich" would be pronounced as "Sah-rah-neech."

[Return just the main response. Take out the pre-text and the post-text]
What is the Croatian name for "Croatia" and how is it pronounced in both Croatian and English?
The Croatian name for "Croatia" is "Hrvatska." In Croatian, it is pronounced as "Hrvatska" (hur-vat-ska). In English, it is pronounced as "Croatia" (kroh-ay-shuh).

[Return just the main response. Take out the pre-text and the post-text]
What about Serbia?
The name for "Serbia" remains the same in both Serbian and English. It is pronounced as "Serbia" (sir-bee-uh) in English and "Srbija" (sir-bee-yuh) in Serbian.

[Return just the main response. Take out the pre-text and the post-text]
How do you pronounce "Shiloh" in English?
"Shiloh" is pronounced as "SHY-loh" in English.

[Return just the main response. Take out the pre-text and the post-text]
How do you pronounce "Qianlong"?
"Qianlong" is pronounced as "chien-long" in English.
How do you pronounce "Qianlong" in its native langugage?

In its native language, Mandarin Chinese, "Qianlong" is pronounced as "chee-ehn long" with the tone of the syllables as follows: "chee-ehn" (first syllable: rising tone) and "long" (second syllable: neutral tone).
